title: KKN di Desa Penari: Luwih Dowo, Luwih Medeni
original_title: KKN di Desa Penari: Luwih Dowo, Luwih Medeni
overview: A group of students encounter strange and terrifying events during their community service in a remote village. This film is an extended version of 2022's KKN di Desa Penari.
